children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary shall promulgate regulations to address administrative and enforcement issues involved in carrying out dairy margin coverage.

children.heading: Reconstitution
children.label: b Reconstitution
children.text: The Secretary shall promulgate regulations to prohibit a dairy producer from reconstituting a dairy operation for the purpose of the dairy producer receiving dairy margin coverage payments.

children.heading: Administrative appeals
children.label: c Administrative appeals
children.text: Using authorities under and subtitle H of the Department of Agriculture Reorganization Act ( et seq.), the Secretary shall promulgate regulations to provide for administrative appeals of decisions of the Secretary that are adverse to participants of dairy margin coverage.section 1308(h) of this title7 U.S.C. 6991
